# Buyer

**Department:** Purchasing
**Reports to:** Owner
**Last updated:** 2026-06-10

The goal of this role is to keep stock available without overbuying.

This person is a senior individual contributor.

## Objectives + Metrics

- **Avoid stockouts** — fill rate above 98% · Metric: fill rate

## Role Responsibilities

### Core Loop

#### Weekly

- [ ] **Reorder** — low-stock SKUs using [shopify](../tools/shopify.md)

### Triggered Tasks

- [ ] **Expedite** — when a SKU hits zero → rush a PO

## KOODAR Breakdown

### K — Know
- Supplier lead times.

### O — Observe
- Inventory levels.

### O — Orient
- Seasonal demand.

### D — Decide
- Reorder quantities.

### A — Act
- Place POs.

### R — Review
- Stockout incidents.
